query: SELECT tu.id, tu.email, tu.name, tu.role, tu.isActive, tu.tenantId, t.companyName FROM tenantUsers tu JOIN tenants t ON t.id = tu.tenantId WHERE tu.passwordHash IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
